title: The Ultimate Thaumcraft 4 Modpack
description: this is a modpack that is for thaumcraft, this will be updated
body:
**!!THIS MODPACK IS IN DEVELOPMENT, NOT EVERYTHING IS FINAL, SO DON'T SUE ME OR SOMETHING BECAUSE I DIDN'T LINK A MOD OR SOMETHING LIKE THAT!!**
  
  **Note: Read the whole description, it is important that you do!**

So this modpack is centred around Thaumcraft, but it does have some other mods, mostly centred around magic with a few exceptions.

This mod pack mixes both mods from Curseforge and Modrinth, partly because I couldn't find some mods on Modrinth that I decided to put on here and partly for no reason, so if I needed to disclose this information, there it is.

I will link the required links in newer versions so dont sue me please because i havent linked a mod to the original mod in here. they will be linked in the description in the next version, i'm just not doing it now because I want to share this modpack to the world right now.

### Links for mods that are in the modpack:
- [Baubles](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1294623-baubles-1-4-6-1-5-2-updated-2018-1-10)
- [Witchery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/witchery)
- [Thaumcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft)
- [Thaumic Tinkerer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumic-tinkerer)
- [Thaumic Bases](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumic-bases)
- [Animus (aka NOVA)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/animus)
- [Levels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/levels)
- [DummyCore](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dummycore)
- [Blood Arsenal](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blood-arsenal)
- [Zelda Sword Skills](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zelda-sword-skills)
- [Tainted Magic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tainted-magic)
- [Lunatrius Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lunatriuscore)

### Links for mods that aren't in the modpack:
- [ParticleLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/particlelib)
- [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)
- [Garden Of Glass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botania-garden-of-glass)
- [Baubles Stuff](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles-stuff)
- [Floating Ruins](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1281180-daftpvfs-mods-treecapitator-crystalwing)

The reason that they are split up into two different mod types is because I need to include a link to the original mod for some mods, and the four others are mods I don't have permission to put in the mod pack so I have included them here for if you want them, (except ParticleLib, that one is requred for some mods.)
